title: $50 000* growing prize fund
subtitle: The previous month-long tournament ended with a $231 376 prize fund.
yellow: Will you be there to see that record shattered?
asterisk-1: *One will get a share of the prize fund only in case of winning the tournament.
subtitle-2: 80% of your payments during the tournament will go to the prize pool! All participating traders will start the tournament with a special account with a balance of 10,000 USD.
